# RC-05: Risk Threshold Evaluation

**Track:** Risk Controls (`RC`) · **Priority:** MUST (mandatory) · **Status:** draft

Aggregate all Stage 4 control results and determine whether the residual risk of the change falls within the organisation's risk appetite. Produces one of three outcomes: pass (proceed to Stage 5), conditional pass (proceed with documented risk acceptance from appropriate authority), or fail (return to Stage 3). This is the formal go/no-go gate for deployment.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 4 | Testing & Documentation | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Agent calculates, human decides |
| **Agent does** | Aggregate all Stage 4 results; calculate residual risk score; present recommendation with supporting evidence. |
| **Human does** | Make the formal go/no-go decision. For conditional pass: provide documented risk acceptance. |

## Inputs

| Artifact | Source Control | Description |
|----------|---------------|-------------|
| Test results report | QC-06 | Functional and NFR test results. |
| AI output validation report | QC-07 | AI-specific test results (if applicable). |
| Documentation completeness report | QC-08 | Documentation verification results. |
| SAST scan results | SC-12 | Static security analysis findings. |
| DAST scan results | SC-13 | Dynamic security analysis findings. |
| Bias & fairness test report | AC-05 | AI bias testing results (if applicable). |


## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| Risk threshold evaluation decision | decision | Go/no-go decision with residual risk score, rationale, and (for conditional pass) formal risk acceptance. | 7 years (DORA) |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_release |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | block |
| **Escalate to** | Risk Officer |

Fail result blocks progression. Work returns to Stage 3. Conditional pass requires formal risk acceptance before Stage 5.

## Dependencies

- `QC-06`
- `QC-08`
- `SC-12`
- `SC-13`


## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 8(1) | Risk appetite and tolerance levels must be respected; changes exceeding appetite must not proceed |
| EU AI Act | Art. 9(2)(a) | Estimation and evaluation of known and foreseeable risks before deployment |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** Risk Management · **Owner role:** Risk Officer
